3 IRFASIID IRF_ASMT_INT_ID Encrypted D16Assessment Internal ID CHAR 10 This field is used as a key to uniquely identify an assessment and to tie together all the different tables that compose one assessment record received from a facility.
4 ASMTMDCD ASMT_MOD_CD Assessment Modification Code CHAR 1 A code designating the version of the assessment. C = Current, M = Modified, X = Inactive
